generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft for measuring rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind cycloidal gearbox for measuring output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time rotational position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurements from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box model combining Coulomb friction and viscous damping components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model capturing low-velocity effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for detailed stick-slip dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural description via Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulating friction models and deriving torque/velocity"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data integration and semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualizing friction dynamics and motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of physical relationships via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Improving motion accuracy through model refinement and control updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into joint friction dynamics for control algorithm optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of physical relationships for improved understanding"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction model updates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and torque output τ_M"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component transferring torque τ_G between motor and gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox converting input torque to output torque τ_out for machining applications"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance FirstAxisPhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIKController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization; live measurements streamed via MQTT for immediate friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, MQTT-sourced sensor data, and dashboard visualization within a digital shadow framework for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured data to validate friction models; continuous identification to address changes due to wear, tools, or applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data (current, angle) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for data integration; SysML as standard modeling language for system description."
]
